question: On Friday, Marvin sold 4 suits that had a mean sale price of $125. On Saturday, he sold 6 suits that had a mean sale price of $140. What was the mean sale price, to the nearest dollar, for all 10 of the suits he sold on Friday and Saturday?

solution.strategy: Total Friday = 4 × 125 = 500; total Saturday = 6 × 140 = 840; combined mean = 1340 / 10 = 134.

question: On Friday, Diane sold 5 suits that had a mean sale price of $120. On Saturday, she sold 5 suits that had a mean sale price of $150. What was the mean sale price, to the nearest dollar, for all 10 of the suits she sold on Friday and Saturday?

solution.strategy: Total Friday = 5 × 120 = 600; total Saturday = 5 × 150 = 750; combined mean = 1350 / 10 = 135.

question: On Friday, Carl sold 3 suits that had a mean sale price of $100. On Saturday, he sold 7 suits that had a mean sale price of $130. What was the mean sale price, to the nearest dollar, for all 10 of the suits he sold on Friday and Saturday?

solution.strategy: Total Friday = 3 × 100 = 300; total Saturday = 7 × 130 = 910; combined mean = 1210 / 10 = 121.

question: On Friday, Paula sold 6 suits that had a mean sale price of $90. On Saturday, she sold 4 suits that had a mean sale price of $120. What was the mean sale price, to the nearest dollar, for all 10 of the suits she sold on Friday and Saturday?

solution.strategy: Total Friday = 6 × 90 = 540; total Saturday = 4 × 120 = 480; combined mean = 1020 / 10 = 102.

solution.strategy: Total Friday = 5 × 80 = 400; total Saturday = 5 × 100 = 500; combined mean = 900 / 10 = 90.

question: On Friday, Henry sold 2 suits that had a mean sale price of $150. On Saturday, he sold 8 suits that had a mean sale price of $112.50. What was the mean sale price, to the nearest dollar, for all 10 of the suits he sold on Friday and Saturday?

solution.strategy: Total Friday = 2 × 150 = 300; total Saturday = 8 × 112.50 = 900; combined mean = 1200 / 10 = 120.

question: On Friday, Irene sold 7 suits that had a mean sale price of $95. On Saturday, she sold 3 suits that had a mean sale price of $135. What was the mean sale price, to the nearest dollar, for all 10 of the suits she sold on Friday and Saturday?

solution.strategy: Total Friday = 7 × 95 = 665; total Saturday = 3 × 135 = 405; combined mean = 1070 / 10 = 107.
